name: Expired Energy Drink
flavor: It tastes like battery acid got a marketing degree.

name: Mystery Meat Burrito
flavor: The mystery is legally protected.

name: Coupon Blade
flavor: Expires yesterday. Still cuts today.

name: Stapler of Minor Regret
flavor: Mostly for paperwork. Occasionally for goblins.

name: Corporate Riot Shield
flavor: Transparent, heavy, and branded with an apology.

name: Left Shoe of Acceleration
flavor: Only the left one survived. It has plans.

name: Helmet of Bad Ideas
flavor: Every dent is a previous suggestion.

name: Tray of Equal Opportunity
flavor: A lunchroom shield that chose violence.

name: Mascot Whistle
flavor: Only some of the things that answer are mascots.

name: Printer Toner Grenade
flavor: For when the document really has to make an impression.

name: HOA Violation Notice
flavor: The edges are sharp. The tone is sharper.

name: Soggy Crowbar
flavor: Damp, reliable, and emotionally unavailable.

name: Carnival Sledge
flavor: Hit hard enough and something has to give you a prize.

name: Dryer Sheet Cape
flavor: Fresh scent. Questionable aerodynamics.

name: Lost Luggage Plate
flavor: It has seen Cleveland three times without you.

name: Skip Intro Halberd
flavor: It removes exposition and occasionally limbs.

name: Executive Coffee IV
flavor: A promotion in liquid form. Side effects include blinking through time.

name: Absurd Brand Lobster
flavor: No one knows who sponsored it. Everyone fears the claws.

name: Bulk Pack Bandages
flavor: Individually wrapped, emotionally unavailable.

name: Sample Cup of Destiny
flavor: A tiny serving of something heroic and probably dairy-based.

name: Pallet Jack Halberd
flavor: Forks forward, confidence backward.

name: Membership Card Shield
flavor: Protects against blades and some annual fees.

name: Churro Shiv
flavor: Crunchy, sweet, and inadmissible in court.

name: Ride Photo Flashbang
flavor: Captures the moment right before regret.

name: Mascot Head Bucket
flavor: Visibility is poor. Vibes are worse.

name: Turnstile Spear
flavor: It only spins one way: into trouble.

name: Hospital Pudding Cup
flavor: The label says vanilla. The pudding disagrees.

name: IV Bag of Espresso
flavor: Administered directly into poor judgment.

name: Clipboard Cleaver
flavor: Cuts, clips, and requests your insurance card.

name: Lead Apron of Denial
flavor: Safe from radiation. Vulnerable to stairs.

name: Detention Slip Fan
flavor: A thousand minor infractions, folded into violence.

name: Cafeteria Milk Bomb
flavor: Best by 2009. Worst right now.

name: Varsity Pad Armor
flavor: Smells like grass stains and unresolved rivalries.

name: Hall Pass of Escape
flavor: Signed by nobody. Respected by fear.

name: Buffet Tongs of Grabbing
flavor: Good reach. Questionable hygiene.

name: Life Jacket of Denial
flavor: Will not save you emotionally.

name: Soft Serve Plasma
flavor: Comes out of the machine screaming.

name: Tiny Umbrella of Luck
flavor: Makes any drink legally tactical.

name: Headset of Escalation
flavor: You can hear the complaint before it forms.

name: Hold Music Flute
flavor: Three notes, infinite irritation.

name: Supervisor Red Button
flavor: Do not press unless prepared to be measured.

name: Survey Coupon Stack
flavor: Worth five percent off pain.

name: Folding Chair of Truth
flavor: A classic argument ender.

name: Potluck Casserole Square
flavor: Nobody knows who brought it. Everybody respects it.

name: Donation Bucket Helmet
flavor: Every hit sounds like loose change and disappointment.

name: Choir Pitch Pipe
flavor: Summons confidence and possibly bats.

name: Smart Toaster Shrapnel
flavor: Pairs with jam and emergency surgery.

name: Doorbell Camera Charm
flavor: Alerts you to danger and porch pirates.

name: Thermostat Scepter
flavor: Every degree is a threat.

name: Vacuum Bag Breastplate
flavor: Full of crumbs, hair, and tactical padding.

name: Lanyard Whip
flavor: The plastic sleeve leaves a mark.

name: Expo Tote of Holding
flavor: Contains pens, brochures, and one forbidden sandwich.

name: Booth Demo Laser
flavor: Not rated for use outside controlled sales environments.

name: Bingo Dabber Mace
flavor: Marks cards, walls, and enemies.

name: Golf Cart Bumper
flavor: Low speed. High disrespect.

name: Early-Bird Tonic
flavor: Works best before 4:30 PM.

name: Teleprompter Glass
flavor: Sharp enough to cut to commercial.

name: Boom Mic Spear
flavor: Picks up enemy weakness and background sobbing.

name: Viewer Mail Satchel
flavor: Most of the letters are threats. Some are coupons.

name: Parking Gate Glaive
flavor: Raises slowly, falls with purpose.

name: Lost Ticket Talisman
flavor: You owe forty credits, spiritually.

name: Oil Slick Bottle
flavor: Slippery, flammable, and marketed as artisanal.

name: Concrete Poncho
flavor: Terrible drape. Excellent survivability.

name: Absurd Sponsor Ham
flavor: No one asked for it. The contract says you love it.
